2605.20035.abstract_zh: 全模态大语言模型（Omni-modal Large Language Models, om-LLMs）通过将视频与音频编码为时间对齐的标记序列，并在窗口级别交错排列，实现了统一的视听理解。然而，在整个大语言模型中处理这些密集的非文本标记会带来显著的计算开销。尽管免训练标记选择方法能够降低这一成本，但现有方法要么仅关注纯视觉输入，要么仅在大语言模型前以固定的模态比例对om-LLM标记进行剪枝，未能捕捉跨模态标记重要性随网络层演化的动态特性。为克服这一局限，我们首先分析了om-LLMs中层间标记依赖关系。研究发现，视觉与音频依赖呈现块状分布模式，并随网络深度逐渐减弱，这表明许多深层非文本标记在完成跨模态融合后变得冗余。受此观察启发，我们提出了SEATS——一种用于高效om-LLM推理的免训练、阶段自适应标记选择方法。在大语言模型处理前，SEATS通过注意力加权的多样性选择去除时空冗余；在模型内部，它基于查询相关性评分跨块逐步剪枝标记，并动态分配时间窗口的保留预算至不同模态；在深层网络中，一旦跨模态融合完成，即移除所有剩余的非文本标记。在Qwen2.5-Omni与Qwen3-Omni上的实验表明，SEATS能有效提升推理效率：仅保留10%的视觉与音频标记，即可实现9.3倍的浮点运算量降低和4.8倍的前填充加速，同时保持原始模型96.3%的性能表现。

2605.18746.title: ESI-Bench: Towards Embodied Spatial Intelligence that Closes the Perception-Action Loop
2605.18746.abstract: Spatial intelligence unfolds through a perception-action loop: agents act to acquire observations, and reason about how observations vary as a function of action. Rather than passively processing what is seen, they actively uncover what is unseen - occluded structure, dynamics, containment, and functionality that cannot be resolved from passive sensing alone. We move beyond prior formulations of spatial intelligence that assume oracle observations by recasting the observer as an actor. We introduce ESI-BENCH, a comprehensive benchmark for embodied spatial intelligence spanning 10 task categories and 29 subcategories built on OmniGibson, grounded in Spelke's core knowledge systems. Agents must decide what abilities to deploy - perception, locomotion, and manipulation - and how to sequence them to actively accumulate task-relevant evidence. We conduct extensive experiments on state-of-the-art MLLMs and find that active exploration substantially outperforms passive counterparts, with agents spontaneously discovering emergent spatial strategies without explicit instructions, while random multi-view often adds noise rather than signal despite consuming far more images. Most failures stem not from weak perception but from action blindness: poor action choices lead to poor observations, which in turn drive cascading errors. While explicit 3D grounding stabilizes reasoning on depth-sensitive tasks, imperfect 3D representation proves more harmful than 2D baselines by distorting spatial relations. Human studies further reveal that unlike humans who seek falsifying viewpoints and revise beliefs under contradiction, models commit prematurely with high confidence regardless of evidence quality, exposing a metacognitive gap that neither better perception nor more embodied interaction alone can close.
2605.18746.abstract_zh: 空间智能通过感知-行动循环展开：智能体通过行动获取观察，并推理观察如何随行动变化。它们并非被动处理所见信息，而是主动揭示不可见之物——那些仅凭被动感知无法解析的遮挡结构、动态变化、内部构造与功能特性。我们摒弃了先前空间智能研究中假定全知观察的范式，将观察者重新定位为行动者。基于斯佩尔克核心知识系统，我们在OmniGibson平台上构建了ESI-BENCH基准测试——一个涵盖10个任务类别与29个子类别的具身空间智能综合评估体系。智能体需自主决策何时调用感知、移动与操控能力，并通过合理编排行动序列来主动积累任务相关证据。我们对前沿多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）展开广泛实验，发现主动探索策略显著优于被动观测模式：智能体能在无明确指令情况下自发涌现空间策略，而随机多视角观测虽消耗更多图像却往往引入噪声而非有效信息。多数失败案例并非源于感知薄弱，而是由于行动盲区：低效的行动选择导致观测质量低下，继而引发级联错误。尽管显式三维空间定位能提升深度敏感任务的推理稳定性，但存在缺陷的三维表征会扭曲空间关系，其负面影响甚至超过二维基线。人类对比研究进一步揭示：与人类主动寻找证伪视角并在矛盾中修正信念的行为模式不同，现有模型会无视证据质量而过早形成高置信度判断，这种元认知缺陷既无法仅凭增强感知能力弥补，也难以通过单纯的具身交互来解决。

2605.18646.title: Language-Switching Triggers Take a Latent Detour Through Language Models
2605.18646.abstract: Backdoor attacks on language models pose a growing security concern, yet the internal mechanisms by which a trigger sequence hijacks model computations remain poorly understood. We identify a circuit underlying a language-switching backdoor in an 8B-parameter autoregressive language model, where a three-word Latin trigger (nine tokens) redirects English output to French. We decompose the circuit into three phases: (1) distributed attention heads at early layers compose the trigger tokens into the last sequence position; (2) the resulting signal propagates through mid-layers in a subspace orthogonal to the model's natural language-identity direction; (3) the MLP at the final layer converts this latent signal into French logits. The entire circuit flows through a serial bottleneck at a single position: corrupting that position at any layer entirely mitigate the trigger but also hinder the model's capabilities. The orthogonal latent encoding suggests that defenses that search for language-like signals in intermediate representations would miss this trigger entirely.
2605.18646.abstract_zh: 语言模型中的后门攻击日益引发安全担忧，然而触发序列如何劫持模型计算的内在机制仍不甚明晰。我们在一个80亿参数的自回归语言模型中发现了一个语言切换后门的内部电路机制，其中由三个拉丁语单词（九个标记）组成的触发序列能将英语输出重定向至法语。我们将该电路解构为三个阶段：（1）早期层的分布式注意力头将触发标记组合至序列末位；（2）生成的信号通过中间层在与模型自然语言身份方向正交的子空间中传播；（3）末层多层感知机将该潜信号转化为法语对数概率。整个电路流经单个位置形成的串行瓶颈：破坏任意层中该位置的信息可完全消除触发效应，但也会削弱模型的基础能力。正交潜编码表明，若仅在中间表征中搜索类语言信号，现有防御机制将完全无法检测此类触发。

2605.17026.title: Why Do Reasoning Models Lose Coverage? The Role of Data and Forks in the Road
2605.17026.abstract: Recent progress in large language models has led to the emergence of reasoning models, which have shown strong performance on complex tasks through specialized fine-tuning procedures. While these methods reliably improve pass@1 accuracy, prior works have observed that they show a coverage shrinkage behavior, where pass@k degrades relative to the base model. In this paper, we investigate the reasoning shrinkage arise under SFT-based post-training. We hypothesize that this behavior is driven by properties of the fine-tuning data, specifically related to decision points or "forks in the road" scenarios where model faces indecipherable patterns with multiple valid reasoning paths. To test this hypothesis, we design controlled case studies that simulate such decision-point settings, spanning indecipherable nodes in graph branching, and reasoning modes. By tracking post-training dynamics in these settings, we find that the shrinkage phenomenon is tightly correlated with the prevalence of decision-point scenarios in the training data. We also demonstrate that this shrinkage behavior can be partially mitigated through targeted data synthesis design of decision-points, and a more systematic diversity-encouraging decoding mechanism. Our findings identify data-centric factors as a key driver of shrinkage in reasoning models and highlight diversity-aware designs as an effective lever for controlling it.
2605.17026.abstract_zh: 近期大语言模型的进展催生了推理模型的出现，这些模型通过专门的微调程序在复杂任务上展现出强大性能。尽管这些方法能可靠提升pass@1准确率，但已有研究观察到它们呈现出覆盖范围收缩的现象——即与基础模型相比，pass@k指标出现下降。本文研究了基于监督微调的后训练中产生的推理收缩现象。我们假设该现象由微调数据的特性驱动，特别是与决策点（或称“道路分叉”）场景相关，即模型面临具有多条有效推理路径的模糊模式。为验证这一假设，我们设计了受控案例研究，模拟此类决策点场景，涵盖图分支中的模糊节点及推理模式。通过追踪这些场景中的后训练动态，我们发现收缩现象与训练数据中决策点场景的出现频率紧密相关。同时，我们证明通过针对性的决策点数据合成设计，以及更具系统性的鼓励多样性解码机制，可以部分缓解这种收缩行为。我们的研究结果表明：以数据为中心的因素是推理模型收缩现象的关键驱动因素，而注重多样性的设计可成为控制该现象的有效杠杆。

2605.12623.title: DocAtlas: Multilingual Document Understanding Across 80+ Languages
2605.12623.abstract: Multilingual document understanding remains limited for low-resource languages due to scarce training data and model-based annotation pipelines that perpetuate existing biases. We introduce DocAtlas, a framework that constructs high-fidelity OCR datasets and benchmarks covering 82 languages and 9 evaluation tasks. Our dual pipelines, differential rendering of native DOCX documents and synthetic LaTeX-based generation for right-to-left scripts produce precise structural annotations in a unified DocTag format encoding layout, text, and component types, without learned models for core annotation. Evaluating 16 state-of-the-art models reveals persistent gaps in low-resource scripts. We show that Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) using rendering-derived ground truth as positive signal achieves stable multilingual adaptation, improving both in-domain (+1.9%) and out-of-domain (+1.8%) accuracy without measurable base-language degradation, where supervised fine-tuning degrades out-of-domain performance by up to 21%. Our best variant, DocAtlas-DeepSeek, improves +1.7% over the strongest baseline. Code is available atthis https URL.
2605.12623.abstract_zh: 由于训练数据稀缺以及基于模型的标注流程持续放大现有偏见，低资源语言的多语言文档理解能力仍然受限。我们提出了DocAtlas框架，该框架构建了覆盖82种语言和9项评估任务的高保真OCR数据集与基准测试体系。我们的双通道流程——对原生DOCX文档进行差异化渲染，以及为从右向左书写文字生成基于LaTeX的合成文档——以统一的DocTag格式（编码布局、文本及组件类型）生成精确的结构化标注，其核心标注过程无需依赖学习型模型。通过对16个前沿模型的评估，我们揭示了低资源文字处理中持续存在的性能差距。研究表明，以渲染衍生的真实数据作为正向信号的直接偏好优化（Direct Preference Optimization, DPO）能实现稳定的多语言适应，在保持基础语言性能无显著衰减的同时，提升领域内（+1.9%）与领域外（+1.8%）的准确率；而监督微调则会使领域外性能下降高达21%。我们的最佳变体DocAtlas-DeepSeek相较于最强基线模型提升了+1.7%。代码可通过此链接获取：https://...

2605.08472.title: Mid-Training with Self-Generated Data Improves Reinforcement Learning in Language Models
2605.08472.abstract: The effectiveness of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in Large Language Models (LLMs) depends on the nature and diversity of the data used before and during RL. In particular, reasoning problems can often be approached in multiple ways that rely on different forms of reasoning, and exposure to only a limited range of such approaches in the training data may limit the effectiveness of RL. Motivated by this, we investigate using diverse self-generated data during mid-training as an intermediate step before RL training. Specifically, we adopt a bootstrapped data-generation framework guided by George Polya's problem-solving approaches for generating multiple variants of correct answers for each question in the training data, and then perform fine-tuning. We first provide a theoretical perspective on how mid-training on such data improves RL and explain how policy-gradient updates can incentivize combining multiple approaches. We then empirically demonstrate that RL-trained models initialized with our mid-training data achieve consistent improvements across various mathematical reasoning benchmarks and other OOD tasks like code generation and narrative reasoning. Overall, our investigative study shows that a language model learning multiple problem-solving approaches, through self-generated data helps subsequent RL.
2605.08472.abstract_zh: 强化学习（Reinforcement Learning, RL）在大语言模型（Large Language Models, LLMs）中的有效性，取决于RL前后所用数据的性质与多样性。具体而言，推理问题通常可通过依赖不同推理形式的多种方式来解决，而训练数据中若仅接触有限范围的解决途径，可能会限制RL的效果。受此启发，我们研究在RL训练前的中间步骤中，利用多样化的自我生成数据进行中期训练（mid-training）。具体来说，我们采用一种引导式自举数据生成框架，以乔治·波利亚（George Polya）的问题解决方法为指导，为训练数据中的每个问题生成多种正确答案变体，然后进行微调。我们首先从理论角度阐述了在此类数据上进行中期训练如何提升RL效果，并解释了策略梯度更新如何激励模型整合多种解决方法。随后，我们通过实证表明，使用我们的中期训练数据初始化的RL训练模型，在多种数学推理基准测试以及其他领域外任务（如代码生成和叙事推理）中均实现了持续改进。总体而言，本研究表明，语言模型通过自我生成数据学习多种问题解决方法，有助于后续的强化学习。

2605.17909.title: Ethical Hyper-Velocity (EHV): A Provably Deterministic Governance-Aware JIT Compiler Architecture for Agentic Systems
2605.17909.abstract: As autonomous agentic systems scale across regulated critical infrastructures, the lack of mechanistic, hardware-rooted enforcement for high-frequency policy updates presents a fundamental safety gap. We introduce Ethical Hyper-Velocity (EHV), a novel architectural framework for the formal verification of AI governance policies at runtime. Unlike retrospective auditing frameworks (ISO/IEC 42001, NIST AI RMF) which introduce 14-30 day latencies, EHV relocates the Policy Enforcement Point (PEP) into the inference pipeline via a Governance-Aware Just-In-Time (JIT) Compiler. By integrating Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs) for policy synchronization and Epoch-based Attestation Caching within Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), EHV achieves Sub-millisecond Formal Determinism (SMFD). We demonstrate via TLA+ formal verification that non-compliant agentic actions are computationally unreachable within the system's bounded operating state space. We prove that O(1) runtime enforcement can eliminate the traditional trade-off between deployment velocity and governance integrity, reducing Governance Latency from O(days) to O(1).
2605.17909.abstract_zh: 随着自主代理系统在受监管的关键基础设施中大规模部署，高频次策略更新缺乏基于硬件的机制化强制执行能力，构成了根本性的安全缺口。本文提出伦理超高速（Ethical Hyper-Velocity，EHV）架构框架，为运行时人工智能治理策略的形式化验证提供创新解决方案。相较于引入14-30天延迟的事后审计框架（ISO/IEC 42001，NIST AI RMF），EHV通过治理感知即时（Governance-Aware Just-In-Time，JIT）编译器将策略执行点（Policy Enforcement Point，PEP）移至推理流水线内部。通过整合无冲突复制数据类型（Conflict-free Replicated Data Types，CRDTs）实现策略同步，并在可信执行环境（Trusted Execution Environments，TEEs）内建立基于周期的认证缓存机制，EHV实现了亚毫秒级形式确定性（Sub-millisecond Formal Determinism，SMFD）。我们通过TLA+形式验证证明，在系统有界运行状态空间内，不合规的代理行为在计算上不可达。研究证实O(1)运行时执行能够消除部署速度与治理完整性之间的传统权衡，将治理延迟从O(天数)量级降至O(1)常数级。

2605.19147.title: Be Kind, Rewrite: Benign Projections via Rewriting Defend Against LLM Data Poisoning Attacks
2605.19147.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are highly susceptible to backdoor attacks (BAs), wherein training samples are poisoned using trigger-based harmful content. Furthermore, existing defenses have proven ineffective when extensively tested across BA patterns. To better combat BAs, we explore the use of LLM rewriting as a proactive defense against data poisoning. First, we theoretically show that when LLM rewriting utilizes open-book benign samples--termed open-book benign rewriting (OBBR)--the probability of a rewritten output being benign is strictly greater than that of closed-book rewriting. Thus, OBBR neutralizes harmful content by projecting training samples to the space of benign prompts. We then show that, in contrast to previous defenses, OBBR effectively mitigates a large number of existing BAs: across five known BAs and four widely used LLMs, OBBR increases safety performance by an average 51% compared to state-of-the-art BA defenses and 25.7% compared to closed-book rewriting methods. Finally, we show that OBBR is computationally efficient relative to other BA defenses, does not degrade model performance on natural language tasks after fine-tuning, and is capable of defending against non-trigger based data poisoning attacks.
2605.19147.abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLMs）极易受到后门攻击（BAs）的影响，此类攻击通过植入基于触发器的有害内容对训练样本进行投毒。此外，现有防御机制在多种后门攻击模式的广泛测试中已被证明效果有限。为更有效应对后门攻击，我们探索将大语言模型重写技术作为对抗数据投毒的主动防御策略。首先，我们从理论上证明：当大语言模型重写采用开放式良性样本——称为开放式良性重写（OBBR）时，重写输出结果为良性的概率严格高于封闭式重写。因此，开放式良性重写通过将训练样本投影至良性提示空间，有效中和了有害内容。我们进一步论证，与既有防御手段相比，开放式良性重写能显著抵御大量现存后门攻击：在五种已知后门攻击与四种广泛使用的大语言模型测试中，开放式良性重写将安全性能平均提升51%（相较于最先进的后门攻击防御方案）和25.7%（相较于封闭式重写方法）。最后，我们证明开放式良性重写相较其他后门攻击防御方案具有计算高效性，经过微调后不会降低模型在自然语言任务上的性能表现，且能有效防御非触发器型数据投毒攻击。

2605.17659.title: Bug or Feature$^2$: Weight Drift, Activation Sparsity and Spikes
2605.17659.abstract: The design of modern neural architectures has converged through incremental empirical choices, yet the mechanisms governing their training dynamics remain only partially understood. We identify and analyze a negative weight drift induced by the interaction between standard losses and positively biased activation functions. We prove that under MSE or cross-entropy loss, the gradient with respect to positive pre-activations is non-negative in expectation at initialization, driving downstream weights toward negative values during early training. The drift is intrinsic to optimization rather than data, and persists across architectures (MLP, ResNet, ViT, GPT-nano, MP-SENe) and asymmetric activation functions (ReLU, GELU, SiLU). Coupled with ReLU, weight drift produces activation sparsity reaching up to 90\% in GPT-nano. We characterize the sparsity-accuracy tradeoff across 79 configurations and identify a sharp accuracy cliff above $\sim$70\% activation sparsity. While ReLU$^2$ achieves a good sparsity--accuracy ratio in GPT-nano, it pathologically amplifies identified activation spikes in intermediate transformer layers. Clipping resolves this while preserving the representational benefits of squaring: clipped ReLU$^2$ outperforms its unclipped version, and GELU$^2$ achieves the lowest validation loss on GPT-nano. Code is available atthis https URL.
2605.17659.abstract_zh: 现代神经架构的设计已通过渐进的经验性选择趋于收敛，然而支配其训练动态的机制仍只被部分理解。我们发现并分析了由标准损失函数与正偏置激活函数相互作用引发的负权重漂移。我们证明，在均方误差或交叉熵损失下，初始化时正预激活值的梯度期望为非负，这会在早期训练期间驱使下游权重向负值移动。该漂移是优化过程固有的，而非由数据导致，并在多种架构（MLP、ResNet、ViT、GPT-nano、MP-SENe）和非对称激活函数（ReLU、GELU、SiLU）中持续存在。与ReLU结合时，权重漂移可在GPT-nano中产生高达90%的激活稀疏度。我们系统评估了79种配置下的稀疏度-准确率权衡关系，发现在激活稀疏度超过约70%时存在急剧的准确率陡降。虽然ReLU$^2$在GPT-nano中实现了较好的稀疏度-准确率比率，但它会病态地放大中间Transformer层中已识别的激活尖峰。截断操作在保留平方运算表征优势的同时解决了这一问题：截断版ReLU$^2$优于其未截断版本，而GELU$^2$在GPT-nano上取得了最低验证损失。代码发布于此https网址。

2605.17360.title: Omni-DuplexEval: Evaluating Real-time Duplex Omni-modal Interaction
2605.17360.abstract: Real-time duplex interaction is essential for multimodal AI systems operating in real-world scenarios, where models must continuously process streaming inputs and respond at appropriate moments. However, most existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are evaluated in offline settings, where the entire video input is processed before any response is generated. While recent work has started to explore real-time duplex MLLMs, there is still no comprehensive benchmark or automatic evaluation method for this setting. To address this gap, we propose Omni-DuplexEval, a benchmark for systematically evaluating real-time duplex interaction. The benchmark consists of two complementary scenarios: (1) Real-Time Description, which evaluates the ability to generate continuous, time-aligned responses that track evolving multimodal inputs, and (2) Proactive Reminder, which evaluates the ability to identify salient events and respond at appropriate moments. Omni-DuplexEval contains 660 videos with fine-grained, human-annotated labels and precise temporal metadata, spanning 9 tasks grounded in real-world scenarios, where all questions are formulated as open-ended queries. We further introduce an automatic evaluation framework based on LLM-as-a-Judge, which enables systematic assessment by jointly evaluating response-content alignment and response timing through timestamp-aware and sequential reasoning, achieving strong alignment with human judgments. Experiments on state-of-the-art duplex MLLMs reveal substantial limitations. The best-performing model achieves only 39.6% overall, while scoring only 20.0% on Proactive Reminder. Our analysis identifies two key challenges: models struggle to balance timely responses with coherent, holistic content generation, and they often fail to determine both when to respond and what to produce. We hope our work facilitates further progress in MLLMs.
2605.17360.abstract_zh: 实时双向交互对于在现实场景中运行的多模态人工智能系统至关重要，此类场景要求模型能够持续处理流式输入并在适当时机作出响应。然而，现有大多数多模态大语言模型（Multimodal Large Language Models, MLLMs）均在离线环境下进行评估，即需先处理完整视频输入才生成响应。尽管近期研究已开始探索实时双向MLLMs，但该领域仍缺乏全面的基准测试或自动评估方法。为填补这一空白，我们提出Omni-DuplexEval——一个用于系统评估实时双向交互能力的基准测试。该基准包含两个互补场景：（1）实时描述，评估模型生成连续、时间对齐的响应以追踪动态演变的多模态输入的能力；（2）主动提醒，评估模型识别关键事件并在适当时机作出响应的能力。Omni-DuplexEval包含660段带有细粒度人工标注标签与精确时间元数据的视频，涵盖9个基于真实场景的任务，所有问题均以开放式查询形式呈现。我们进一步引入了基于"大语言模型即评判员"（LLM-as-a-Judge）的自动评估框架，通过时间戳感知与序列推理联合评估响应内容对齐度与响应时机，实现了与人类判断的高度一致性。对前沿双向MLLMs的实验揭示了显著局限性：表现最佳的模型总体得分仅为39.6%，在主动提醒任务中得分更低至20.0%。我们的分析指出两大关键挑战：模型难以在及时响应与生成连贯完整内容之间取得平衡，且经常无法同时决定何时响应及响应内容。本研究有望推动多模态大语言模型的进一步发展。

2605.09789.title: Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Robot Learning: A Dexterous Manipulation Study on Reactive Catching
2605.09789.abstract: Dexterous manipulation is physics-intensive and highly sensitive to modeling errors and perception noise, making sim-to-real transfer prohibitively challenging. Domain randomization (DR) is commonly used to improve the robustness of learned policies for such tasks, but conventional DR randomizes one instance per episode, offering very limited exposure to the variability of real-world dynamics. To this end, we propose Domain-Randomized Instance Set (DRIS), which represents and propagates a set of randomized instances simultaneously, providing richer approximation of uncertain dynamics and enabling policies to learn actions that account for multiple possible outcomes. Supported by theoretical analysis, we show that DRIS yields more robust policies and alleviates the need for real-world fine-tuning, even with a modest number of instances (e.g., 10). We demonstrate this on a challenging reactive catching task. Unlike traditional catching setups that use end-effectors designed to mechanically stabilize the object (e.g., curved or enclosing surfaces), our system uses a flat plate that offers no passive stabilization, making the task highly sensitive to noise and requiring rapid reactive motions. The learned policies exhibit strong robustness to uncertainties and achieve reliable zero-shot sim-to-real transfer.
2605.09789.abstract_zh: 灵巧操作涉及大量物理过程，且对建模误差与感知噪声高度敏感，这使得仿真到真实环境的迁移面临巨大挑战。领域随机化（Domain Randomization, DR）通常被用于提升此类任务中学习策略的鲁棒性，但传统DR方法仅在每次训练周期中随机化单个实例，对真实世界动态变化的覆盖极为有限。为此，我们提出领域随机化实例集（Domain-Randomized Instance Set, DRIS），该方法能同时表征并传播一组随机化实例，从而更丰富地逼近不确定的动态特性，并使策略能够学习到兼顾多种可能结果的动作。理论分析表明，即使仅使用少量实例（例如10个），DRIS也能产生更具鲁棒性的策略，并减少对真实世界精细调优的依赖。我们通过一项具有挑战性的反应式抓取任务验证了这一方法。传统抓取装置通常采用能机械稳定物体的末端执行器（如曲面或包围式结构），而本系统使用无被动稳定功能的平板，使得任务对噪声极为敏感，且需要快速的反应动作。学习得到的策略展现出对不确定性的强鲁棒性，并实现了可靠的零样本仿真到真实环境迁移。

2605.08586.title: Computer Science Conferences Should Require Nonrepudiable Experimental Results
2605.08586.abstract: This position paper argues that computer science conferences should require tamper-evident, nonrepudiable attestations of experimental results. We name the underlying problem experiment nonrepudiation: a compliant protocol must bind the numbers in a paper to an actual executed computation in a way the author cannot later alter or deny. The current system relies on self-reported checklists, optional code sharing, and author-controlled logging. None of these mechanisms answer the question a reviewer cannot check: did the code the paper describes produce the numbers the paper reports? We define the problem formally, state the security properties any compliant protocol must satisfy, and describe a threat model that includes attacks current approaches do not prevent. To show that the problem is solvable, we built K-Veritas, a reference implementation in Go that produces signed reports without accessing training data. K-Veritas is a testbed, not a finished answer. We call on conferences and the community to treat nonrepudiation as a first-class requirement and to help build an open, independent standard for it.
2605.08586.abstract_zh: 本立场文件主张，计算机科学会议应要求对实验结果提供防篡改且不可抵赖的证明。我们将这一根本问题命名为实验不可抵赖性（experiment nonrepudiation）：一个合规的协议必须将论文中的数据与真实执行的计算过程绑定，使作者事后无法更改或否认。现行体系依赖于自我报告式的清单、可选的代码共享以及由作者控制的日志记录。这些机制均无法回答审稿人无法验证的问题：论文所描述的代码是否生成了论文所报告的数据？我们正式界定了该问题，阐述了任何合规协议必须满足的安全特性，并描述了一种威胁模型，其中包含了当前方法无法防范的攻击类型。为证明该问题可解，我们构建了K-Veritas——一个用Go语言编写的参考实现，它能在不接触训练数据的情况下生成签名报告。K-Veritas是一个测试平台，而非最终解决方案。我们呼吁会议界及学术界将不可抵赖性视为首要要求，并共同构建一个开放的、独立的行业标准。

2605.19516.title: Base Models Look Human To AI Detectors
2605.19516.abstract: As AI-generated text enters the real-world at scale, institutions increasingly use commercial AI-text detectors, especially in education and academic-integrity workflows. We report a surprising empirical finding about such systems: when evaluated by GPTZero and Pangram, generated text from base models is often judged overwhelmingly human, whereas text generated by their instruction-tuned counterparts is not. Building on this observation, we propose Humanization by Iterative Paraphrasing (HIP), a detector-agnostic pipeline that minimally fine-tunes a base model into a paraphraser and applies it iteratively. Compared with the baselines we test, HIP yields a stronger trade-off between semantic preservation and detector evasion on commercial detectors. Across Llama-3 and Qwen-3 families, spanning model sizes from 0.6B to 70B, HIP consistently improves detector human-likeness. Our findings suggest that current detectors are tracking artifacts of instruction tuning and local context more than any invariant notion of machine-generated text. This, in turn, calls for detector designs that model these factors more explicitly.
2605.19516.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能生成文本大规模进入现实世界，各类机构越来越多地使用商业AI文本检测器，尤其是在教育和学术诚信工作流程中。我们报告了一项关于此类系统的惊人实证发现：在GPTZero和Pangram的评估中，基础模型生成的文本常被判定为高度接近人类写作，而其指令微调版本生成的文本则不然。基于这一观察，我们提出了迭代改写人化方法（Humanization by Iterative Paraphrasing, HIP），这是一种与检测器无关的流程，通过对基础模型进行最小化微调使其成为改写器，并迭代应用该模型。相较于我们测试的基线方法，HIP在商业检测器上实现了语义保持与检测规避之间更强的权衡效果。在Llama-3和Qwen-3系列模型中——涵盖从0.6B到70B的模型规模——HIP持续提升了文本在检测器中的类人化程度。我们的研究结果表明，当前检测器主要追踪的是指令微调的痕迹和局部上下文特征，而非机器生成文本的不变本质属性。这进而呼吁检测器设计需要更明确地对这些因素进行建模。

2605.19014.title: SAGA: A Sequence-Adaptive Generative Architecture for Multi-Horizon Probabilistic Forecasting with Adaptive Temporal Conformal Prediction
2605.19014.abstract: Microsimulation models used by ministries of finance and central banks rely on parametric processes for lifetime earnings that capture only first and second moments of the conditional distribution and miss long-range nonlinear structure. We propose SAGA, a decoder-only transformer for irregular tabular panel sequences, paired with a split conformal calibration wrapper that delivers individual-level prediction intervals with finite-sample marginal coverage guarantees. Trained on the longitudinal Swedish LISA register over 1990 to 2022, comprising 2,143,817 individuals and 61,284,903 person-years, the model forecasts annual labor earnings at horizons of one to thirty years and aggregates them by Monte Carlo into present-discounted lifetime earnings distributions. Against the canonical Guvenen, Karahan, Ozkan, and Song parametric process and tabular and recurrent baselines, SAGA reduces continuous ranked probability score by 31.9 percent at the ten-year horizon and mean absolute error by 37.7 percent at the twenty-year horizon. Conformal intervals achieve nominal coverage to within 0.4 percentage points marginally and within 2.4 percentage points on the worst-case demographic subgroup. The reconstructed lifetime earnings Gini coefficient is 0.327 against the partially observed truth of 0.341 and the GKOS estimate of 0.378. Model weights, calibration tables, and a synthetic equivalent dataset are released for replication outside the protected SCB MONA environment.
2605.19014.abstract_zh: 财政部和中央银行使用的微观模拟模型依赖于描述终身收入参数化过程，这类方法仅捕捉条件分布的一阶和二阶矩，而忽略了长期非线性结构。我们提出SAGA——一种专为不规则表格面板序列设计的仅解码器Transformer模型，结合分割保形校准封装器，可在有限样本条件下提供具有边际覆盖保证的个体层面预测区间。该模型基于1990年至2022年瑞典纵向整合数据库LISA进行训练，涵盖2,143,817个个体与61,284,903人年数据，能够预测一至三十年跨度的年度劳动收入，并通过蒙特卡洛方法聚合为折现终身收入分布。相较于经典的Guvenen、Karahan、Ozkan和Song参数化过程以及表格与循环基线模型，SAGA在十年预测期将连续排序概率评分降低31.9%，在二十年预测期将平均绝对误差降低37.7%。保形预测区间在边际层面实现名义覆盖率偏差不超过0.4个百分点，在最不利人口亚组中偏差不超过2.4个百分点。重建的终身收入基尼系数为0.327，而部分观测真实值为0.341，GKOS估计值为0.378。模型权重、校准表及合成等效数据集已公开发布，可在受保护的瑞典统计局MONA环境外进行复现研究。

2605.17076.title: S-Bus: Automatic Read-Set Reconstruction for Multi-Agent LLM State Coordination
2605.17076.abstract: Concurrent LLM agents sharing mutable natural-language state produce Structural Race Conditions (SRCs): write-write and cross-shard stale-read conflicts that silently corrupt agent output. Existing multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen) provide no write-ownership semantics over shared state.We present S-Bus, an HTTP middleware whose central mechanism is a server-side DeliveryLog: a per-agent log of HTTP GET operations that automatically reconstructs each agent's read set at commit time without agent SDK changes under HTTP/1.1. The consistency property the DeliveryLog provides -- Observable-Read Isolation (ORI), a partial causal consistency over the HTTP-observable projection of the read set -- prevents structural race conditions when agents collaborate via shared shards.Three contributions: (C1) The DeliveryLog mechanism for automatic HTTP-traffic-based read-set reconstruction, with three-tier mechanised evidence: ReadSetSoundness and ORICommitSafety machine-checked in TLAPS (modulo one retained typing axiom); exhaustive TLC at N=3 (20,763,484 distinct states, zero violations); Dafny discharges 9 inductive soundness lemmas. (C2) Empirical structural-conflict prevention parity against PostgreSQL 17 SERIALIZABLE and Redis 7 WATCH/MULTI on shared-shard contention sweeps with 427,308 active HTTP-409 conflicts: zero Type-I corruptions across all three backends. (C3) ORI's operating envelope is topology-conditional: semantically neutral in dedicated-shard workloads; harmful in single-shard collaborative writing because preservation propagates concurrent contradictions.Source code:this https URL
2605.17076.abstract_zh: 共享可变自然语言状态的并发LLM代理会产生结构性竞态条件（SRCs）：即写-写冲突与跨分片陈旧读冲突，这些冲突会静默破坏代理输出。现有多代理框架（LangGraph、CrewAI、AutoGen）未对共享状态提供写入所有权语义。我们提出S-Bus——一种HTTP中间件，其核心机制是服务端的交付日志（DeliveryLog）：该按代理记录的HTTP GET操作日志可在HTTP/1.1协议下无需修改代理SDK的情况下，在提交时自动重构每个代理的读集合。交付日志提供的一致性属性——可观察读隔离（Observable-Read Isolation，ORI），即对读集合在HTTP可观测投影上的偏因果一致性——能在代理通过共享分片协作时预防结构性竞态条件。本研究的三个贡献：（C1）提出基于HTTP流量自动重构读集合的交付日志机制，并给出三层机械化证据：读集合完备性（ReadSetSoundness）与ORI提交安全性（ORICommitSafety）在TLAPS中完成机器验证（仅保留一条类型公理）；在N=3时完成穷举式TLC验证（涵盖20,763,484个独立状态，零违规）；Dafny验证器完成9条归纳完备性引理的证明。（C2）在共享分片争用扫描测试中（共产生427,308次活跃HTTP-409冲突），实证证明本方案与PostgreSQL 17可串行化隔离级别及Redis 7 WATCH/MULTI机制在预防结构性冲突方面达到同等效果：三种后端均实现零型一损坏。（C3）揭示ORI的运行范围具有拓扑条件性：在专有分片工作负载中语义中立；在单分片协同写作场景中则可能有害，因为保留机制会传播并发矛盾。源代码：此 https URL

2605.15514.title: RoPE Distinguishes Neither Positions Nor Tokens in Long Contexts, Provably
2605.15514.abstract: We identify intrinsic limitations of Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE) in Transformer-based long-context language models. Our theoretical analysis abstracts away from the specific content of the context and depends only on its length. We prove that as context length increases, RoPE-based attention becomes unpredictable and loses two properties that are central to its effectiveness. First, it loses its locality bias: RoPE is no more likely to favor nearer positions than substantially farther ones. Second, it loses consistency in token relevance: a key vector that receives a higher attention score than an alternative at one position may receive a lower score at another. In both cases, the probability of failure approaches 0.5, no better than random guessing. We further prove that the attention score can remain unchanged when a key token is moved to a different position, or even replaced by a different token, indicating a failure to distinguish positions or tokens. Adjusting the RoPE base trades off distinguishing positions against distinguishing tokens but cannot preserve both at the same time. Increasing the RoPE base hyperparameter, a common practice in today's long-context models, helps distinguish different tokens, but inevitably sacrifices the ability to distinguish positions. Our empirical analysis shows that multi-head, multi-layer architectures are insufficient to overcome these limitations. Our findings suggest that fundamentally new mechanisms for encoding position and token order may be needed in future Transformer long-context language models.
2605.15514.abstract_zh: 本文揭示了基于Transformer的长上下文语言模型中旋转位置编码（Rotary Positional Embeddings, RoPE）的内在局限性。我们的理论分析将上下文的具体内容抽象化，仅关注其长度维度。研究证明，随着上下文长度的增加，基于RoPE的注意力机制会变得不可预测，并丧失其有效性的两个核心特性：首先，它失去了局部性偏好——RoPE对较近位置与较远位置的关注度差异趋于消失；其次，它丧失了词元相关性的一致性——在某位置获得较高注意力分数的关键向量，在其他位置可能获得更低分数。这两种情况下，失效概率均趋近0.5，与随机猜测无异。我们进一步论证了当关键词元被移至不同位置，甚至被替换为不同词元时，注意力分数可能保持不变，这表明模型无法有效区分位置或词元。调整RoPE的基数（base）参数需要在区分位置与区分词元之间进行权衡，但无法同时保持两者。增加RoPE基数超参数作为当前长上下文模型的常见实践，虽有助于区分不同词元，却不可避免地以牺牲位置分辨能力为代价。实证分析表明，多头多层架构不足以克服这些局限性。我们的研究启示，未来Transformer长上下文语言模型可能需要从根本上设计新的位置与词元顺序编码机制。

2605.20147.short_zh: 构建超高清文生图数据集与模型
2605.20147.tags: 计算机视觉;图像生成;超高清文生图
2605.20147.body_summary:
文本到图像模型在超高分辨率生成上面临数据稀缺等挑战。
本文构建了高质量超大分辨率数据集，并基于此训练了原生100MP生成模型，同时建立了综合评估基准。

2605.19786.short_zh: 快速生成动态三维网格模型
2605.19786.tags: 计算机图形学;三维重建;动态网格生成
2605.19786.body_summary:
现有方法从视频生成动态三维网格慢且计算开销大，难以处理长序列。
提出免训练时空注意力链框架，通过隐空间传播对应关系实现快速高质量生成，提速13倍且支持长视频。

2605.14842.tags: 计算机视觉;图像编辑与生成;抽象图像编辑指令跟随
2605.14842.body_summary:
目前图像编辑基准主要关注显式指令，缺乏对抽象指令的系统评估。
本文构建了首个抽象图像编辑基准，提出了基于实体分解的评估框架，并发现现有模型难以平衡意图与保真度。

2605.18101.short_zh: 卫星生成城市建筑能耗与影像
2605.18101.tags: 计算机视觉;遥感图像生成;城市建筑能耗建模
2605.18101.body_summary:
城市建筑能耗建模是实现可持续发展目标的关键，但现有方法存在预测性、缺乏生成能力、数据稀缺等挑战。
提出SENSE框架，基于可控扩散模型，联合生成卫星影像与对齐的建筑能耗及高度图，提升数据生成质量和下游预测精度。

2605.16003.short_zh: 交互式长视频生成记忆框架
2605.16003.tags: 计算机视觉;视频生成;长视频记忆管理
2605.16003.body_summary:
现有方法难以处理交互式长视频生成中的提示词切换和场景记忆问题。
提出了一个无需训练的记忆框架，通过解耦历史信息、压缩场景和自适应遗忘来统一支持平滑过渡、硬切和长程场景回忆。

2605.20150.short_zh: 十亿高斯训练的单GPU外存优化方法
2605.20150.tags: 计算机图形学;三维重建;高斯溅射外存训练
2605.20150.body_summary:
传统3D高斯溅射训练因参数内存过大而受限于千万级规模，难以处理十亿级场景。
提出TideGS框架，通过外存管理、异步流水线与差分流技术，在单张24GB GPU上实现了十亿高斯的高质量训练。

2605.15458.short_zh: 视频扩散模型的奖励优化推理
2605.15458.tags: 计算机视觉;视频生成;可验证推理任务
2605.15458.body_summary:
视频扩散模型在感知真实性和时序连贯性上进步显著，但主要优化目标是生成合理性而非可验证的推理，这使其在需满足明确约束的任务中存在局限。
本文提出VideoRLVR框架，通过基于规则的反馈优化视频扩散模型，其核心包括SDE-GRPO优化主干、密集分解奖励和旨在降低训练延迟的早步聚焦策略，并在多个可验证推理任务上超越基准。

2605.19995.short_zh: 推理驱动可控视频生成
2605.19995.tags: 计算机视觉；视频生成；创意意图可控视频生成
2605.19995.body_summary:
现有扩散模型在抽象、稀疏或复杂条件下难以生成符合用户创意意图的视频，存在能力空白。
提出了CogOmniControl框架，通过专用CogVLM准确认知创意意图并转化为密集推理，再通过CogOmniDiT统一控制生成视频，并引入最佳选择闭环机制。

2605.18263.short_zh: 高斯建模反射透射新视角
2605.18263.tags: 计算机图形学；三维重建；半透明表面渲染
2605.18263.body_summary:
三维高斯泼溅技术在复杂半透明镜面表面的反射与透射建模上存在模糊与遮挡问题。
提出了RT-Splatting框架，通过分解几何占用与光学不透明度，结合表面与体渲染，实现高保真反射与清晰透射的实时绘制。

2605.20183.short_zh: 多镜头音视频生成评测基准
2605.20183.tags: 生成式人工智能；视频生成；多镜头音视频生成评测
2605.20183.body_summary:
现有方法难以系统可靠地评估前沿的多镜头音视频生成模型。
提出了首个综合性基准与自适应评估框架，并评估了19个先进模型。

2605.19305.tags: 计算机图形学;几何处理;三角网格流形匹配
2605.19305.body_summary:
本文旨在实现三角网格上信号的生成，并使训练好的模型能有效应用于不同网格和三角剖分。
提出了使用谱定义保证剖分无关性的Matérn噪声分布，并基于PoissonNet设计去噪器，在超百万面片上实现了高质量多样性的信号生成。

2605.11609.short_zh: 反自蒸馏改进数学推理
2605.11609.tags: 强化学习；大语言模型推理；数学推理优化
2605.11609.body_summary:
传统自蒸馏在数学推理中效果不稳定，特权上下文会扭曲教师模型的置信度
提出反自蒸馏方法，通过提升师生模型差异，加速训练并显著提高最终准确率

2605.16403.short_zh: 研究多模态模型在视频中理解声音的虚假能力
2605.16403.tags: 多模态学习;视听问答;音频虚假接地
2605.16403.body_summary:
当前视频理解大模型常依赖视觉线索推断声音而非真正理解音频，存在“视听聪明的汉斯”效应。
我们提出干预测试框架诊断该问题，并设计对齐训练方法提升模型的真实音频验证能力。

2605.14236.short_zh: 主动学习优化大模型排序
2605.14236.tags: 自然语言处理;信息检索;大模型排序优化
2605.14236.body_summary:
现有大模型排序方法存在噪声大、成本高、排序不稳定等问题。
我们将排序重构为主动学习问题并引入噪声鲁棒框架，用更少调用量提升排序质量。

2605.20025.short_zh: 多智能体自主科研协作系统
2605.20025.tags: 自主智能系统；科学发现自动化；多代理研究管道
2605.20025.body_summary:
现有自主科研系统常将研究建模为线性流程，存在单智能体推理、失败即停止、经验不传承等问题。
我们提出了AutoResearchClaw，它通过多智能体辩论、自修复执行、可验证报告、人机协作和跨轮次演化五项机制，将失败转化为信息，在基准测试中性能提升显著。

2605.19769.short_zh: 构建可验证的软件世界用于计算机使用智能体
2605.19769.tags: 人机交互;智能体基础环境;可验证软件世界构建
2605.19769.body_summary:
背景/任务是：为计算机使用智能体（如AI助手）创建可靠、可验证的操作环境。
我们提出了OpenComputer框架，它通过应用状态验证器、自进化验证层等组件，构建了一个覆盖33款桌面应用和1000项任务的验证系统，用于评估智能体在真实软件环境中的操作能力。

2605.19577.short_zh: 长上下文强化学习新方法
2605.19577.tags: 强化学习;长上下文处理;能力导向数据与优化
2605.19577.body_summary:
现有长上下文强化学习方法的数据构造和奖励设计存在任务覆盖单一、脱离实际需求的问题
提出了能力导向的公开数据集和异构多任务优化方法TMN-Reweight，有效提升了长上下文性能

2605.15529.short_zh: 过程奖励模型引入可靠性学习
2605.15529.tags: 自然语言处理;推理与规划;过程奖励模型
2605.15529.body_summary:
当前过程奖励模型(PRM)仅提供单一步骤奖励评分，无法告知何时应信任这些预测。
本文提出BetaPRM，它能预测步骤成功概率及其可靠性，并利用此信号改进推理任务，如在最佳N选择中自适应分配计算量。

2605.18703.short_zh: 自动合成工具环境与数据强化智能体
2605.18703.tags: 强化学习;智能体强化学习;可执行环境合成与轨迹生成
2605.18703.body_summary:
现有方法依赖昂贵的真实API或易产生幻觉的模拟器，且合成数据常与真实人类意图不符，限制了工具智能体的规模化训练。
提出EnvFactory框架，能自动从真实资源探索和验证可执行工具环境，并合成自然的多轮训练轨迹，使用更少环境实现了更优性能。

2605.17734.short_zh: 让大模型技能可编程以提升任务表现
2605.17734.tags: 大语言模型与智能体;智能体规划与推理;技能学习与重用
2605.17734.body_summary:
现有方法将经验编码为文本指导，缺乏明确的干预机制，难以有效处理复杂长程任务。
我们提出HASP框架，将技能升级为可执行的程序函数，可在推理时干预、后训练时监督或自改进时演化，显著提升多任务表现。

2605.18748.short_zh: 视频编辑智能代理框架
2605.18748.tags: 计算机视觉;视频内容生成;智能视频编辑
2605.18748.body_summary:
现有统一视频编辑模型需要用户提供精确的文本、参考图像和空间位置等信息，而真实请求往往信息不全。
我们提出了Aurora框架，用一个工具增强的视觉语言模型智能代理来解析用户请求，生成结构化编辑计划，从而驱动统一的视频扩散模型进行编辑。

2605.18984.short_zh: 评估多模态大模型视频生成瑕疵检测能力
2605.18984.tags: 计算机视觉;视频生成质量评估;AI生成视频瑕疵检测与诊断
2605.18984.body_summary:
当前AI生成的视频仍存在时间不一致、结构扭曲和语义不连贯等瑕疵，而多模态大模型感知和推理这些瑕疵的能力尚不明确。
我们构建了一个包含三类视频和三项任务的基准测试，评估了19个主流模型，发现它们在瑕疵感知和推理上存在显著不足。

2605.19436.short_zh: 强化学习中优化奖励分配
2605.19436.tags: 强化学习;奖励建模;推理步骤识别
2605.19436.body_summary:
传统强化学习对所有正确解给予相同奖励，无法区分关键推理步骤和无关填充。
提出对比证据策略优化，通过对比正确与错误答案的偏好来精确分配奖励，提升模型推理能力。

2605.17829.short_zh: 为互动式AI评估建立设计科学
2605.17829.tags: 自然语言处理;语言模型评估;互动评估范式
2605.17829.body_summary:
AI评估正经历结构性变化，大模型作为系统与环境、用户及工具交互，但现有评估方法仍基于静态基准假设。
本文提出应将互动评估视为独立范式，定义了其证据到评判的映射，构建分类体系与设计原则，并分析了轨迹层面的评估挑战。

2605.18758.short_zh: 提出多模态智能手机GUI智能体评测基准
2605.18758.tags: 人机交互;图形用户界面智能体;多模态智能手机环境评测
2605.18758.body_summary:
现有GUI智能体基准主要依赖静态截图，而真实手机交互需要处理瞬态音频和时序视频动态。
我们构建了首个步进式多模态基准OmniGUI，并评估了基础模型在同步视听信号场景中的能力退化与瓶颈。

2605.20087.short_zh: 构建理解用户心思的AI助手
2605.20087.tags: 自然语言处理;人机交互;用户思维建模
2605.20087.body_summary:
现有对话数据集只记录用户说了什么，无法捕捉其真实想法。
我们收集真实对话与用户心理注释数据集，证明其用于行为预测和模型训练的价值。

2605.18714.short_zh: 统一多模态模型生成对齐新方法
2605.18714.tags: 计算机视觉;多模态学习;视觉理解与生成协同
2605.18714.body_summary:
当前统一多模态模型在视觉理解和生成任务上的训练策略是分离的，导致两者表征空间不对齐，无法相互促进。
本文提出语义生成调优（SGT）新范式，利用图像分割作为生成代理任务，有效协同了模型的多模态理解与生成能力。

2605.09640.short_zh: 强化微调缓解视觉连续学习遗忘
2605.09640.tags: 机器学习;持续学习;视觉任务持续学习
2605.09640.body_summary:
近期研究发现强化微调比监督微调更能抵抗灾难性遗忘，但其在视觉连续学习中的效果尚不明确。
本文提出保留感知策略优化方法，通过轨迹级奖励塑形显式缓解遗忘，在多类视觉连续学习任务中实现了领先性能。

2605.18855.tags: 自然语言处理；深度学习模型架构；残差连接注意力机制
2605.18855.body_summary:
注意力残差连接通过学习对先前层输出的软注意力来替代标准加性残差连接，但其注意力对象是高度冗余的累积隐藏状态，导致深层出现路由崩溃问题。
本文提出Delta注意力残差连接，改为关注每层输出的变化量（增量），这能产生更聚焦的注意力分布，从而在多个模型规模上实现更有效的跨层路由和更好的性能。

2605.18827.short_zh: 小语言模型代码引导推理评估
2605.18827.tags: 自然语言处理;问答系统;代码引导推理
2605.18827.body_summary:
现有基准通常将小语言模型直接作为选择题答案生成器评估，但实际部署的系统越来越多地依赖外部工具和代码等脚手架。
提出了代码引导推理评估协议和配套资源，通过生成可执行程序来量化脚手架对小模型在选择题任务上的提升效果，并分析了其优势与局限性。

2605.19633.short_zh: 通用文本优化系统统一求解
2605.19633.tags: 自然语言处理;文本生成与优化;基于大语言模型的文本参数优化
2605.19633.body_summary:
研究探索单个基于大语言模型的优化系统能否像专门工具一样，解决不同领域的优化问题。
该系统将问题统一为优化文本参数，在六个任务上取得顶尖效果，并通过实验揭示了跨任务迁移和附带信息的重要性。

2605.19932.short_zh: 长上下文大型语言模型代理定向缓存系统
2605.19932.tags: 自然语言处理;大型语言模型;长上下文代理
2605.19932.body_summary:
大型语言模型代理需反复处理冗长且重复的外部上下文，但现有方法缺乏对上下文本身可重用定向知识的有效维护。
提出PEEK系统，通过维护一个固定大小的上下文地图，缓存上下文的结构、组织和关键实体等定向知识，从而显著提升代理的准确性和效率。

2605.20104.short_zh: 用修剪加强检索的推测解码加速
2605.20104.tags: 自然语言处理;语言模型推理加速;推测解码
2605.20104.body_summary:
推测解码通过构建草案树来加速大模型推理，但大树会带来计算和带宽开销，而动态剪枝虽能降低延迟却会损失有效候选，限制接受率。
本文提出Graft框架，将剪枝与检索耦合：剪枝腾出计算预算用于检索，检索则补偿剪枝丢失的覆盖范围，通过“先剪后接”机制无损填补空缺，在多种场景下提升加速效果。

2605.18226.short_zh: 长上下文生成中的前缀高效利用
2605.18226.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型推理加速;长前缀注意力优化
2605.18226.body_summary:
现代大语言模型应用依赖长前缀控制生成，但存在前缀影响衰减和计算开销大的问题。
将前缀预计算为注意力状态外存，无需训练即可提升长上下文生成效果并降低延迟。

2605.20164.short_zh: 动态调整量规奖励权重
2605.20164.tags: 自然语言处理;强化学习;量规强化学习
2605.20164.body_summary:
背景/任务是：在需要同时满足多个定性标准的模型训练中，静态量规奖励权重会混淆标准的重要性和其当前的优化信号价值。
本文提出了POW3R框架，它能根据当前策略的输出差异动态调整标准层的奖励权重，从而在保持原有人类权重目标的同时，使奖励信号更具信息量，提升了训练效率和最终性能。

2605.19908.short_zh: 作者信号在编码器何处出现
2605.19908.tags: 自然语言处理;语言模型;作者归属
2605.19908.body_summary:
作者归属模型性能差异取决于评分机制而非表征质量
用归因工具揭示评分机制控制编码器整合作者信号的层位

2605.20075.short_zh: 先答后思改进大模型推理
2605.20075.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型推理;推理效率与可靠性优化
2605.20075.body_summary:
传统思维链方法先推理后回答，可能导致无效计算和延迟响应。
提出CopT方法，先生成草稿答案，再基于答案进行反思修正，通过对比嵌入验证可靠性，动态控制可见性，提高准确率并降低计算成本。

2605.20035.short_zh: 高效多模态大模型推理优化
2605.20035.tags: 多模态学习;多模态大模型推理加速;多模态令牌选择
2605.20035.body_summary:
多模态大语言模型处理密集的视听令牌序列时计算开销巨大。
提出SEATS方法，动态选择并逐步剪枝冗余令牌，在显著提升推理效率的同时保持模型性能。

2605.18746.short_zh: 智能体主动探索空间推理
2605.18746.tags: 具身智能;空间感知与推理;主动感知与行动闭环
2605.18746.body_summary:
背景/任务：传统空间智能研究假设智能体拥有全知视角，而现实中智能体需要通过主动行动（如移动和操控）来逐步获取信息，形成“感知-行动”闭环，以解决遮挡、动态、功能理解等被动观察无法解决的问题。
做了什么：我们构建了ESI-Bench基准，在10大类任务上验证了主动探索策略显著优于被动感知，发现当前模型的失败主要源于“行动盲目性”而非感知能力不足，并揭示了模型在元认知层面与人类的差距。

2605.18646.short_zh: 剖析后门攻击语言切换机制
2605.18646.tags: 自然语言处理;语言模型安全;后门攻击机理
2605.18646.body_summary:
背景/任务：针对语言模型的后门攻击是一个日益增长的安全问题，但其内部触发机制尚不清楚。
做了什么：在一款80亿参数的自回归语言模型中，识别出一个由拉丁语触发词导致输出从英语切换为法语的三阶段内部电路，并揭示了该电路通过特定位置正交子空间传播的机制。

2605.17026.short_zh: 推理模型覆盖度下降原因探究
2605.17026.tags: 自然语言处理;语言模型推理;推理覆盖度下降
2605.17026.body_summary:
研究推理模型在指令微调后覆盖度下降的现象，推测与数据中决策点场景有关。
通过设计决策点仿真实验验证假设，并提出数据合成和解码机制来缓解该问题。

2605.12623.short_zh: 多语言文档理解数据集构建与评测
2605.12623.tags: 自然语言处理;文档智能;多语言文档理解
2605.12623.body_summary:
多语言文档理解因训练数据稀缺和模型标注偏差，在低资源语言上受限。
提出DocAtlas框架，构建82语种高保真数据集和9任务基准；通过渲染与合成流程生成精确标注；评估16个模型发现差距，并用DPO优化实现稳定提升。

2605.08472.short_zh: 强化学习前自生成数据提升模型效果
2605.08472.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型训练;策略强化学习优化
2605.08472.body_summary:
强化学习在大语言模型中的效果受训练数据多样性的制约。
采用自生成多样答案进行中期训练，能提升模型后续强化学习性能。

2605.17909.short_zh: 为智能体系统构建实时合规编译器
2605.17909.tags: 计算机系统;编译技术;智能体实时策略验证
2605.17909.body_summary:
当前智能体系统在关键领域部署时，缺乏对高频策略更新的硬件级实时执行机制，存在安全风险。
我们提出了一个名为EHV的架构，通过将策略验证点集成到JIT编译器中，并采用CRDT和TEE等技术，实现了亚毫秒级的确定性策略执行，确保了不合规行为在计算上不可达。

2605.19147.short_zh: 用良性改写防御大模型数据中毒
2605.19147.tags: 自然语言处理;模型安全;数据中毒攻击
2605.19147.body_summary:
大语言模型极易遭受基于触发器的后门攻击且现有防御效果不佳
提出用开卷式良性改写将训练样本投射到良性提示空间，显著提升多种攻击下的安全性

2605.17659.short_zh: 探究权重偏移与激活稀疏性
2605.17659.tags: 深度学习;神经网络训练;权重漂移与激活稀疏性分析
2605.17659.body_summary:
现代神经网络训练中存在负权重漂移现象，影响激活稀疏性。
发现权重漂移由损失函数与偏置激活函数交互引起，分析其对稀疏性影响并提出改进方案。

2605.17360.short_zh: 实时多模态交互评估新基准
2605.17360.tags: 多模态人工智能;实时交互评估;全双工多模态大模型
2605.17360.body_summary:
现有离线评测无法满足现实场景中模型需实时处理流式输入并择机响应的需求。
提出了包含两个场景的评测基准与自动评估框架，揭示了当前模型在响应时机与内容连贯性上的不足。

2605.09789.short_zh: 强化机器人零样本仿真迁移
2605.09789.tags: 机器人;灵巧操控;仿真到现实迁移
2605.09789.body_summary:
灵巧操控对物理模型误差和感知噪声敏感，仿真到现实的迁移极具挑战性。
提出域随机化实例集方法，通过同时传播多个随机实例来近似不确定性，使策略更鲁棒，并在无真实调优的平板上实现了反应式抓取。

2605.08586.short_zh: 要求实验可验证不可抵赖
2605.08586.tags: 计算机科学;学术研究规范;实验可复现性验证
2605.08586.body_summary:
当前计算机科学会议依赖作者自述和选择性公开代码，无法确保论文数据来自实际运行。
本文定义问题并提出安全要求，开发了原型系统K-Veritas来生成签名报告。

2605.19516.short_zh: 基础模型文本可被检测器误判
2605.19516.tags: 自然语言处理;文本生成;AI生成文本检测
2605.19516.body_summary:
商业AI文本检测器被广泛应用于教育等领域，但我们发现它们容易将基础模型生成的文本误判为人类写作。
我们提出了一种迭代改写方法，能将基础模型微调为改写器，有效绕过检测器并保持语义。

2605.19014.tags: 机器学习;概率时间序列预测;面板数据多步预测
2605.19014.body_summary:
传统宏观仿真模型难以刻画个体收入的长期非线性动态。
提出SAGA模型，利用Transformer提升预测精度，并通过自适应校准确保预测区间覆盖。

2605.17076.short_zh: 自动重建多智能体读写集避免冲突
2605.17076.tags: 自然语言处理;多智能体系统;共享状态一致性
2605.17076.body_summary:
现有大语言模型多智能体框架在共享可变自然语言状态时会导致结构性竞态条件，造成输出静默损坏
我们提出S-Bus中间件，通过服务端传递日志自动重建各智能体读集，提供可观测读隔离一致性，防止协作时的结构性竞态条件

2605.15514.short_zh: 揭示RoPE在长上下文中的失效机制
2605.15514.tags: 自然语言处理;预训练语言模型;长上下文注意力
2605.15514.body_summary:
Transformer长上下文语言模型使用的Rotary位置编码存在内在局限
理论证明RoPE在长上下文会失去位置偏倚与一致性，实验表明调整基参数无法同时区分位置与词元

2605.20147.caption: Figure 3:Overview of ourPixVerve-95Kcuration pipeline that includes:1)High-quality and diverse raw image data acquisition (Sec.˜3.1.1).2)Preliminary data purification comprising five parallel detection procedures (Sec.˜3.1.2).3)100MP data curation via super-resolution (Sec.˜3.1.3).4)Final data filtering to ensure the quality of our synthetic data (Sec.˜3.1.4).5)Stage-wise data caption pipeline carefully designed for UHR images (Sec.˜3.1.5).
2605.20147.caption_zh: 图3：PixVerve-95K数据构建流程总览，主要包括：1) 高质量多样化原始图像数据采集（第3.1.1节）；2) 包含五个并行检测步骤的初步数据净化（第3.1.2节）；3) 通过超分辨率技术实现的100MP数据构建（第3.1.3节）；4) 确保合成数据质量的最终数据过滤（第3.1.4节）；5) 为超高分辨率图像专门设计的阶段性描述生成流程（第3.1.5节）。

2605.20147.caption: Figure 4:Representative discarded and qualified examples for each dimension.Green scoresrepresent disqualification, whilered scoresrepresent passing the detection.
2605.20147.caption_zh: 图4：各维度代表性不合格与合格示例。绿色分数表示未通过检测，红色分数表示通过检测。

2605.20147.caption: Figure 1:PixVerve-95Kis a large-scale, high-quality dataset for Ultra-High-Resolution (UHR) image generation, first advancing Text-to-Image (T2I) generation to the 100MP scale. Featuring high visual fidelity (right) and comprehensive annotations (bottom), it can meet the growing demand for next-generation T2I applications.PixVerve-Benchis a comprehensive benchmark suite comprising 8 metrics for the systematic evaluation of UHR T2I methods (top-right).
2605.20147.caption_zh: 图1：PixVerve-95K 是一个用于超高分辨率图像生成的大规模高质量数据集，首次将文本到图像生成推进至亿像素级别。其具备高视觉保真度（右侧）与全面标注（底部），能满足下一代文本到图像应用日益增长的需求。PixVerve-Bench 是一个综合性基准测试套件，包含8项指标，用于系统性评估超高分辨率文本到图像方法（右上）。

2605.19786.caption: Figure 1:Method overview.Our attention chain follows a point through the frozen 4D generator: from an anchor mesh vertex to latent tokens, across time to target-frame tokens, and back to a target mesh vertex. Image-patch endpoints give analogous chains for 2D tracking, camera pose estimation, and 4D tracking, without additional training.
2605.19786.caption_zh: 图1：方法概览。我们的注意力链在冻结的4D生成器中追踪一个点：从锚定网格顶点到潜在标记，跨时间传递至目标帧标记，再返回到目标网格顶点。图像块端点则为2D跟踪、相机姿态估计和4D跟踪提供了类似的链式流程，且无需额外训练。

2605.19786.caption: Figure 2:Long-sequence rollout.(a) Naive autoregressive 4D generation accumulates errors over time, degrading mesh quality. We find that this drift is driven by weakening latent correspondences across windows. (b) Our correspondence reinforcement preserves these correlations, stabilizing the rollout and maintaining high-quality generation.
2605.19786.caption_zh: 图2：长序列推演。(a) 朴素自回归4D生成方法随时间推移累积误差，导致网格质量下降。我们发现这种漂移是由跨窗口潜在对应关系减弱所驱动的。(b) 通过我们的对应关系强化方法，这些相关性得以保持，从而稳定了推演过程并维持高质量的生成结果。

2605.19786.caption: Figure 3:4D Mesh Generation.Our method produces sharp, temporally consistent meshes, aligns them to the input camera, and runs inonly99sec, compared to120120–900900sec for prior methods. Unlike SG4D and ActionMesh, which generate object-centric meshes, our spatial attention-chain correspondences enable camera recovery and world placement, yielding high foreground overlap (yellow) and fewer mismatch regions (red/green).
2605.19786.caption_zh: 图 3：四维网格生成。与先前方法所需的 120–900 秒相比，我们的方法仅需 99 秒即可生成清晰、时间一致的网格，并将其与输入相机对齐。不同于 SG4D 和 ActionMesh 生成以物体为中心的网格，我们的空间注意力链对应关系能够实现相机恢复与场景定位，从而获得更高的前景重叠区域（黄色）和更少的错配区域（红/绿）。

2605.18101.caption: Figure 1.Proposed GenAI framework for generating satellite image, building height and building energy consumption together.
2605.18101.caption_zh: 图 1. 所提出的用于同步生成卫星图像、建筑高度与建筑能耗的生成式人工智能框架。

2605.18101.caption: Figure 3.Qualitative visualization of generated results across diverse cities.(a) The generated building energy consumption maps and generated satellite imagery. (b) The generated satellite imagery, building height and energy consumption maps conditioning on road networks and prompts.
2605.18101.caption_zh: 图 3. 不同城市生成结果的定性可视化。(a) 生成的建筑能耗地图与生成的卫星影像。(b) 以道路网络和提示词为条件生成的卫星影像、建筑高度及能耗地图。

2605.18101.caption: Figure 6.Data filtering. We filtered out samples that clearly lacked building energy labels.
2605.18101.caption_zh: 图6. 数据筛选。我们过滤掉了明显缺乏建筑能耗标签的样本。

2605.16003.caption: Figure 2:Overview of the proposed Echo-Forcing framework.Our method integrates three scene-memory modules to preserve temporal continuity, recall historical scenes, and suppress conflicting memories during interactive long-video generation.
2605.16003.caption_zh: 图 2：所提出的 Echo-Forcing 框架概览。该方法整合了三个场景记忆模块，以在交互式长视频生成过程中保持时序连续性、回溯历史场景并抑制冲突记忆。

2605.16003.caption: (a)(b)Figure 4:Visualization of scene recall and memory decay.Echo-Forcing stores compact scene memories for recall and adaptively decays old memories according to old–new scene discrepancies.
2605.16003.caption_zh: (a)(b)图4：场景回忆与记忆衰减的可视化。Echo-Forcing 存储紧凑的场景记忆以供回忆，并根据新旧场景差异自适应地衰减旧记忆。

2605.16003.caption: Figure 6:Additional visualization of long-video generation.Echo-Forcing maintains subject identity, background structure, and visual fidelity over extended autoregressive rollouts.
2605.16003.caption_zh: 图6：长视频生成的补充可视化结果。在长时间的自回归推演中，Echo-Forcing 能够保持主体身份、背景结构及视觉保真度。

2605.20150.caption:
Figure 2:TideGS pipeline.(a) Out-of-core hierarchy.The full scene is stored as SSD-resident blocks; CPU RAM maintains a warm cache and schedules prefetch; GPU VRAM acts as a working-set cache for rendering and backpropagation.(b) Trajectory-adaptive differential streaming.Consecutive block working sets𝒦t\mathcal{K}_{t}and𝒦t+1\mathcal{K}_{t+1}guide reuse, while TideGS selects capacity-bounded resident setsℛt\mathcal{R}_{t}andℛt+1\mathcal{R}_{t+1}, retains their overlap, streams only𝒮t+=ℛt+1∖ℛt\mathcal{S}_{t}^{+}=\mathcal{R}_{t+1}\setminus\mathcal{R}_{t}, and evicts𝒮t−=ℛt∖ℛt+1\mathcal{S}_{t}^{-}=\mathcal{R}_{t}\setminus\mathcal{R}_{t+1}while overlapping SSD/PCIe transfers with GPU compute.
①–⑤ indicate the corresponding cross-tier dataflow steps.
2605.20150.caption_zh: 图2：TideGS 流水线。(a) 外存层次结构。完整场景以SSD驻留块形式存储；CPU RAM维护热缓存并调度预取；GPU VRAM充当用于渲染和反向传播的工作集缓存。(b) 轨迹自适应差分流式传输。连续的块工作集𝒦ₜ与𝒦ₜ₊₁指导重用，同时TideGS选择容量受限的驻留集ℛₜ与ℛₜ₊₁，保留其重叠部分，仅流式传输𝒮ₜ⁺=ℛₜ₊₁∖ℛₜ，并在SSD/PCIe传输与GPU计算重叠期间逐出𝒮ₜ⁻=ℛₜ∖ℛₜ₊₁。①–⑤标示了相应的跨层级数据流步骤。

2605.20150.caption:
Figure 3:Block virtualization and two-stage visibility filtering.We (top-left) Morton-sort Gaussians and partition them into SSD-aligned blocks to preserve spatial locality,
(top-right) summarize each block with a bounding sphere,
and (bottom) perform CPU-side 6-plane frustum tests to select visible blocks for H2D staging.
Fine-grained Gaussian-level filtering is then executed on GPU within the retained blocks.
2605.20150.caption_zh: 图 3：块虚拟化与两阶段可见性过滤。（左上）我们对高斯体进行莫顿排序并将其划分为 SSD 对齐的块以保持空间局部性，（右上）使用包围球概括每个块，（底部）在 CPU 端执行 6-平面视锥体测试以选择可见块用于主机到设备（H2D）暂存。随后在 GPU 上对保留块内的体素执行细粒度的高斯体级过滤。

2605.19995.caption: Figure 2:The overall framework of the proposed CogOmniControl. During inference, CogVLM outputs reasoning results based on the given conditions, along with optional evaluator tools. Subsequently, the features from the last layer of CogVLM are concatenated with other latents as the inputs of CogOmniDiT to generate the final result. This process can be repeated multiple times, employing Best-of-N filtering using the evaluator selected by CogVLM. The bottom-left and bottom-right sections illustrate the training processes for CogVLM and CogOmniDiT, respectively.
2605.19995.caption_zh: 图 2：所提出的 CogOmniControl 整体框架。在推理阶段，CogVLM 根据给定条件及可选评估器工具输出推理结果；随后，将 CogVLM 最后一层的特征与其他潜在变量拼接，作为 CogOmniDiT 的输入以生成最终结果。该过程可重复多次，并采用由 CogVLM 选择的评估器进行 N 选最佳过滤。左下与右下部分分别展示了 CogVLM 与 CogOmniDiT 的训练流程。

2605.18263.caption: Figure 2:Overview of RT-Splatting.(Left) Transparent objects are represented by Gaussians with high geometric occupancy but low optical opacity, yielding strong contributions to surface aggregation while avoiding occlusion during volumetric compositing. (Right) Our hybrid rendering pipeline composites surface-based reflections from a deferred pass with volumetric transmission from a forward pass to produce the final color, and suppresses image-loss gradients flowing into the transmission branch according to the specular complexity of the corresponding pixels.
2605.18263.caption_zh: 图 2：RT-Splatting 方法概览。（左）透明物体通过具有高几何占据度但低光学不透明度的高斯分布来表示，从而在表面聚合中产生显著贡献，同时在体素合成过程中避免遮挡。（右）我们的混合渲染管线将来自延迟渲染通道的基于表面的反射与来自前向渲染通道的体透射进行合成，以生成最终颜色，并根据对应像素的镜面反射复杂度抑制流入透射分支的图像损失梯度。

2605.18263.caption: Figure 6:Visual decomposition on real-world scenes.We visualize the decomposed components of our method compared to baselines. For our method,Normalcaptures the surface geometry, whileDepthcorresponds to the volumetric accumulation. Since baseline methods do not explicitly model semi-transparent transmission, we visualize their diffuse component in theTransmissionrow. Our method achieves high-fidelity separation of theReflectionandTransmissionlayers.
2605.18263.caption_zh: 图6：真实场景的可视化解构。我们对比基线方法，可视化所提方法分解出的各组分。本方法中，Normal 捕捉表面几何结构，Depth 对应体积累积。由于基线方法未显式建模半透明透射层，我们在 Transmission 行中展示其漫反射分量。本方法实现了 Reflection 层与 Transmission 层的高保真分离。

2605.20183.caption: Figure 1:Overview of MSAVBench.Left: the benchmark spans four data dimensions, namely video, audio, shot, and reference, covering diverse prompts, shot counts, and realistic and non-realistic scenarios. Right: the evaluation suite assesses generated MSAV content at four levels, including global, cross-shot, intra-shot, and reference levels, using a hybrid strategy that combines specialized expert models, rubric-based scoring, and tool-grounded assessment.
2605.20183.caption_zh: 图 1：MSAVBench 概览。左：基准涵盖视频、音频、镜头和参考四个数据维度，覆盖多样化的提示、镜头数量以及真实与非真实场景。右：评估套件采用结合专用专家模型、基于量规的评分和工具化评估的混合策略，在全局、跨镜头、镜头内部和参考四个层面对生成的 MSAV 内容进行评估。

2605.20183.caption: Figure 3:Overview of the MSAVBench evaluation framework.We first perform agentic pre-processing with iterative shot self-correction to improve boundary quality. Metrics are then evaluated with stratified scoring paradigms, including expert models for well-defined tasks, rubric-based VLM scoring for subjective dimensions, and tool-grounded agentic scoring for complex properties.
2605.20183.caption_zh: 图 3：MSAVBench 评估框架概览。我们首先通过迭代式少样本自校正进行智能体预处理，以提升边界质量。随后通过分层评分范式进行指标评估，包括：针对定义明确任务使用专家模型评分，针对主观维度使用基于量表的视觉语言模型评分，以及针对复杂属性使用基于工具的智能体评分。

2605.20183.caption:
Figure 5:The data construction pipeline of MSAVBench.(1) Domain experts define an eight-category seed taxonomy with fine-grained sub-categories, with diverse types of subject, scene, and visual style.
(2) GPT-5.4 first samples(t​h​e​m​e,s​u​b​j​e​c​t,s​c​e​n​e,s​t​y​l​e)(theme,subject,scene,style)quadruples and synthesises an initial multi-shot script with structured per-shot metadata; a Prompt-Enhancement (PE) model then rewrites it into the global-to-shot format with explicit cinematic language.
(3) Six domain experts review every PE-rewritten script, filter out low-quality / hallucinated cases, and refine ambiguous descriptions.
(4) Reference media are sampled from public benchmarks, automatically tagged by Gemini 3.1 Pro, and finally curated by experts to obtain a clean reference-conditioned subset.
2605.20183.caption_zh: 图5：MSAVBench的数据构建流程。(1)领域专家定义了一个包含细粒度子类的八类别种子分类体系，涵盖多样化的主体、场景与视觉风格类型。(2)GPT-5.4首先采样（主题、主体、场景、风格）四元组，并合成带有结构化分镜头元数据的初始多镜头脚本；随后提示增强模型将其重写为包含明确影视语言的全局到分镜头格式。(3)六位领域专家审核每个经提示增强模型重写的脚本，过滤低质量/幻觉案例，并优化模糊描述。(4)从公共基准中采样参考媒体，通过Gemini 3.1 Pro自动标注，最终经专家筛选获得干净的参考条件子集。
